geographicCoverage.name: geographicCoverage
geographicCoverage.title: Geographic Coverage
geographicCoverage.description: Information on the geographic coverage of the data. Includes the total geographic scope of the data.

country.name: country
country.title: Country / Nation
country.description: The country or nation that the Dataset is about.
controlledVocabularyValues: Congo, the Democratic Republic of the
Macedonia, the Former Yugoslav Republic of
Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

state.name: state
state.title: State / Province
state.description: The state or province that the Dataset is about. Use GeoNames for correct spelling and avoid abbreviations.

city.name: city
city.title: City
city.description: The name of the city that the Dataset is about. Use GeoNames for correct spelling and avoid abbreviations.

otherGeographicCoverage.name: otherGeographicCoverage
otherGeographicCoverage.title: Other
otherGeographicCoverage.description: Other information on the geographic coverage of the data.

geographicUnit.name: geographicUnit
geographicUnit.title: Geographic Unit
geographicUnit.description: Lowest level of geographic aggregation covered by the Dataset, e.g., village, county, region.

geographicBoundingBox.name: geographicBoundingBox
geographicBoundingBox.title: Geographic Bounding Box
geographicBoundingBox.description: The fundamental geometric description for any Dataset that models geography is the geographic bounding box. It describes the minimum box, defined by west and east longitudes and north and south latitudes, which includes the largest geographic extent of the  Dataset's geographic coverage. This element is used in the first pass of a coordinate-based search. Inclusion of this element in the codebook is recommended, but is required if the bound polygon box is included.

westLongitude.name: westLongitude
westLongitude.title: Westernmost (Left) Longitude
westLongitude.description: Westernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= West  Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

eastLongitude.name: eastLongitude
eastLongitude.title: Easternmost (Right) Longitude
eastLongitude.description: Easternmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= East Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

northLatitude.name: northLatitude
northLatitude.title: Northernmost (Top) Latitude
northLatitude.description: Northernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= North Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

southLatitude.name: southLatitude
southLatitude.title: Southernmost (Bottom) Latitude
southLatitude.description: Southernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= South Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

unitOfAnalysis.name: unitOfAnalysis
unitOfAnalysis.title: Unit of Analysis
unitOfAnalysis.description: Basic unit of analysis or observation that this Dataset describes, such as individuals, families/households, groups, institutions/organizations, administrative units, and more. For information about the DDI's controlled vocabulary for this element, please refer to the DDI web page at http://www.ddialliance.org/controlled-vocabularies.

universe.name: universe
universe.title: Universe
universe.description: Description of the population covered by the data in the file; the group of people or other elements that are the object of the study and to which the study results refer. Age, nationality, and residence commonly help to  delineate a given universe, but any number of other factors may be used, such as age limits, sex, marital status, race, ethnic group, nationality, income, veteran status, criminal convictions, and more. The universe may consist of elements other than persons, such as housing units, court cases, deaths, countries, and so on. In general, it should be possible to tell from the description of the universe whether a given individual or element is a member of the population under study. Also known as the universe of interest, population of interest, and target population.

timeMethod.name: timeMethod
timeMethod.title: Time Method
timeMethod.description: The time method or time dimension of the data collection, such as panel, cross-sectional, trend, time- series, or other.

dataCollector.name: dataCollector
dataCollector.title: Data Collector
dataCollector.description: Individual, agency or organization responsible for  administering the questionnaire or interview or compiling the data.

collectorTraining.name: collectorTraining
collectorTraining.title: Collector Training
collectorTraining.description: Type of training provided to the data collector

frequencyOfDataCollection.name: frequencyOfDataCollection
frequencyOfDataCollection.title: Frequency
frequencyOfDataCollection.description: If the data collected includes more than one point in time, indicate the frequency with which the data was collected; that is, monthly, quarterly, or other.

samplingProcedure.name: samplingProcedure
samplingProcedure.title: Sampling Procedure
samplingProcedure.description: Type of sample and sample design used to select the survey respondents to represent the population. May include reference to the target sample size and the sampling fraction.

targetSampleSize.name: targetSampleSize
targetSampleSize.title: Target Sample Size
targetSampleSize.description: Specific information regarding the target sample size, actual  sample size, and the formula used to determine this.

targetSampleSizeFormula.name: targetSampleSizeFormula
targetSampleSizeFormula.title: Formula
targetSampleSizeFormula.description: Formula used to determine target sample size.

deviationsFromSampleDesign.name: deviationsFromSampleDesign
deviationsFromSampleDesign.title: Major Deviations for Sample Design
deviationsFromSampleDesign.description: Show correspondence as well as discrepancies between the sampled units (obtained) and available statistics for the population (age, sex-ratio, marital status, etc.) as a whole.

collectionMode.name: collectionMode
collectionMode.title: Collection Mode
collectionMode.description: Method used to collect the data; instrumentation characteristics (e.g., telephone interview, mail questionnaire, or other).

researchInstrument.name: researchInstrument
researchInstrument.title: Type of Research Instrument
researchInstrument.description: Type of data collection instrument used. Structured indicates an instrument in which all respondents are asked the same questions/tests, possibly with precoded answers. If a small portion of such a questionnaire includes open-ended questions, provide appropriate comments. Semi-structured indicates that the research instrument contains mainly open-ended questions. Unstructured indicates that in-depth interviews were conducted.

dataCollectionSituation.name: dataCollectionSituation
dataCollectionSituation.title: Characteristics of Data Collection Situation
dataCollectionSituation.description: Description of noteworthy aspects of the data collection situation. Includes information on factors such as cooperativeness of respondents, duration of interviews, number of call backs, or similar.

actionsToMinimizeLoss.name: actionsToMinimizeLoss
actionsToMinimizeLoss.title: Actions to Minimize Losses
actionsToMinimizeLoss.description: Summary of actions taken to minimize data loss. Include information on actions such as follow-up visits, supervisory checks, historical matching, estimation, and so on.

controlOperations.name: controlOperations
controlOperations.title: Control Operations
controlOperations.description: Control OperationsMethods to facilitate data control performed by the primary investigator or by the data archive.

weighting.name: weighting
weighting.title: Weighting
weighting.description: The use of sampling procedures might make it necessary to apply weights to produce accurate statistical results. Describes the criteria for using weights in analysis of a collection. If a weighting formula or coefficient was developed, the formula is provided, its elements are defined, and it is indicated how the formula was applied to the data.

cleaningOperations.name: cleaningOperations
cleaningOperations.title: Cleaning Operations
cleaningOperations.description: Methods used to clean the data collection, such as consistency checking, wildcode checking, or other.

datasetLevelErrorNotes.name: datasetLevelErrorNotes
datasetLevelErrorNotes.title: Study Level Error Notes
datasetLevelErrorNotes.description: Note element used for any information annotating or clarifying the methodology and processing of the study.

responseRate.name: responseRate
responseRate.title: Response Rate
responseRate.description: Percentage of sample members who provided information.

samplingErrorEstimates.name: samplingErrorEstimates
samplingErrorEstimates.title: Estimates of Sampling Error
samplingErrorEstimates.description: Measure of how precisely one can estimate a population value from a given sample.

otherDataAppraisal.name: otherDataAppraisal
otherDataAppraisal.title: Other Forms of Data Appraisal
otherDataAppraisal.description: Other issues pertaining to the data appraisal. Describe issues such as response variance, nonresponse rate  and testing for bias, interviewer and response bias, confidence levels, question bias, or similar.

astroType.name: astroType
astroType.title: Type
astroType.description: The nature or genre of the content of the files in the dataset.

astroFacility.name: astroFacility
astroFacility.title: Facility
astroFacility.description: The observatory or facility where the data was obtained.

astroInstrument.name: astroInstrument
astroInstrument.title: Instrument
astroInstrument.description: The instrument used to collect the data.

astroObject.name: astroObject
astroObject.title: Object
astroObject.description: Astronomical Objects represented in the data (Given as SIMBAD recognizable names preferred).

resolution.Spatial.name: resolution.Spatial
resolution.Spatial.title: Spatial Resolution
resolution.Spatial.description: The spatial (angular) resolution that is typical of the observations, in decimal degrees.

resolution.Spectral.name: resolution.Spectral
resolution.Spectral.title: Spectral Resolution
resolution.Spectral.description: The spectral resolution that is typical of the observations, given as the ratio \u03bb/\u0394\u03bb.

resolution.Temporal.name: resolution.Temporal
resolution.Temporal.title: Time Resolution
resolution.Temporal.description: The temporal resolution that is typical of the observations, given in seconds.

coverage.Spectral.CentralWavelength.name: coverage.Spectral.CentralWavelength
coverage.Spectral.CentralWavelength.title: Central Wavelength (m)
coverage.Spectral.CentralWavelength.description: The central wavelength of the spectral bandpass, in meters.

coverage.Spectral.Wavelength.name: coverage.Spectral.Wavelength
coverage.Spectral.Wavelength.title: Wavelength Range
coverage.Spectral.Wavelength.description: The minimum and maximum wavelength of the spectral bandpass.

coverage.Spectral.MinimumWavelength.name: coverage.Spectral.MinimumWavelength
coverage.Spectral.MinimumWavelength.title: Minimum (m)
coverage.Spectral.MinimumWavelength.description: The minimum wavelength of the spectral bandpass, in meters.

coverage.Spectral.MaximumWavelength.name: coverage.Spectral.MaximumWavelength
coverage.Spectral.MaximumWavelength.title: Maximum (m)
coverage.Spectral.MaximumWavelength.description: The maximum wavelength of the spectral bandpass, in meters.

coverage.Temporal.name: coverage.Temporal
coverage.Temporal.title: Dataset Date Range
coverage.Temporal.description: Time period covered by the data.

coverage.Spatial.name: coverage.Spatial
coverage.Spatial.title: Sky Coverage
coverage.Spatial.description: The sky coverage of the data object.

coverage.Depth.name: coverage.Depth
coverage.Depth.title: Depth Coverage
coverage.Depth.description: The (typical) depth coverage, or sensitivity, of the data object in Jy.

coverage.ObjectDensity.name: coverage.ObjectDensity
coverage.ObjectDensity.title: Object Density
coverage.ObjectDensity.description: The (typical) density of objects, catalog entries, telescope pointings, etc., on the sky, in number per square degree.

coverage.ObjectCount.name: coverage.ObjectCount
coverage.ObjectCount.title: Object Count
coverage.ObjectCount.description: The total number of objects, catalog entries, etc., in the data object.

coverage.SkyFraction.name: coverage.SkyFraction
coverage.SkyFraction.title: Fraction of Sky
coverage.SkyFraction.description: The fraction of the sky represented in the observations, ranging from 0 to 1.

redshiftType.name: redshiftType
redshiftType.title: RedshiftType
redshiftType.description: RedshiftType string C "Redshift"; or "Optical" or "Radio" definitions of Doppler velocity used in the data object.

resolution.Redshift.name: resolution.Redshift
resolution.Redshift.title: Redshift Resolution
resolution.Redshift.description: The resolution in redshift (unitless) or Doppler velocity (km/s) in the data object.

coverage.RedshiftValue.name: coverage.RedshiftValue
coverage.RedshiftValue.title: Redshift Value
coverage.RedshiftValue.description: The value of the redshift (unitless) or Doppler velocity (km/s in the data object.

coverage.Redshift.MinimumValue.name: coverage.Redshift.MinimumValue
coverage.Redshift.MinimumValue.title: Minimum
coverage.Redshift.MinimumValue.description: The minimum value of the redshift (unitless) or Doppler velocity (km/s in the data object.

coverage.Redshift.MaximumValue.name: coverage.Redshift.MaximumValue
coverage.Redshift.MaximumValue.title: Maximum
coverage.Redshift.MaximumValue.description: The maximum value of the redshift (unitless) or Doppler velocity (km/s in the data object.

journalVolumeIssue.name: journalVolumeIssue
journalVolumeIssue.title: Journal
journalVolumeIssue.description: Indicates the volume, issue and date of a journal, which this Dataset is associated with.

journalVolume.name: journalVolume
journalVolume.title: Volume
journalVolume.description: The journal volume which this Dataset is associated with (e.g., Volume 4).

journalIssue.name: journalIssue
journalIssue.title: Issue
journalIssue.description: The journal issue number which this Dataset is associated with (e.g., Number 2, Autumn).

journalPubDate.name: journalPubDate
journalPubDate.title: Publication Date
journalPubDate.description: The publication date for this journal volume/issue, which this Dataset is associated with (e.g., 1999).

journalArticleType.name: journalArticleType
journalArticleType.title: Type of Article
journalArticleType.description: Indicates what kind of article this is, for example, a research article, a commentary, a book or product review, a case report, a calendar, etc (based on JATS).

studyDesignType.name: studyDesignType
studyDesignType.title: Design Type
studyDesignType.description: Design types that are based on the overall experimental design.

studyOtherDesignType.name: studyOtherDesignType
studyOtherDesignType.title: Other Design Type
studyOtherDesignType.description: If Other was selected in Design Type, list any other design types that were used in this Dataset.

studyOtherFactorType.name: studyOtherFactorType
studyOtherFactorType.title: Other Factor Type
studyOtherFactorType.description: If Other was selected in Factor Type, list any other factor types that were used in this Dataset.

studyAssayOrganism.name: studyAssayOrganism
studyAssayOrganism.title: Organism
studyAssayOrganism.description: The taxonomic name of the organism used in the Dataset or from which the  starting biological material derives.

studyAssayOtherOrganism.name: studyAssayOtherOrganism
studyAssayOtherOrganism.title: Other Organism
studyAssayOtherOrganism.description: If Other was selected in Organism, list any other organisms that were used in this Dataset. Terms from the NCBI Taxonomy are recommended.

studyAssayMeasurementType.name: studyAssayMeasurementType
studyAssayMeasurementType.title: Measurement Type
studyAssayMeasurementType.description: A term to qualify the endpoint, or what is being measured (e.g. gene expression profiling; protein identification).

studyAssayOtherMeasurmentType.name: studyAssayOtherMeasurmentType
studyAssayOtherMeasurmentType.title: Other Measurement Type
studyAssayOtherMeasurmentType.description: If Other was selected in Measurement Type, list any other measurement types that were used. Terms from NCBO Bioportal are recommended.

studyAssayTechnologyType.name: studyAssayTechnologyType
studyAssayTechnologyType.title: Technology Type
studyAssayTechnologyType.description: A term to identify the technology used to perform the measurement (e.g. DNA microarray; mass spectrometry).
controlledVocabularyValues: culture based drug susceptibility testing, single concentration
culture based drug susceptibility testing, two concentrations
culture based drug susceptibility testing, three or more concentrations (minimium inhibitory concentration measurement)

studyAssayOtherTechnologyType.name: studyAssayOtherTechnologyType
studyAssayOtherTechnologyType.title: Other Technology Type
studyAssayOtherTechnologyType.description: If Other was selected in Technology Type, list any other technology types that were used in this Dataset.

studyAssayPlatform.name: studyAssayPlatform
studyAssayPlatform.title: Technology Platform
studyAssayPlatform.description: The manufacturer and name of the technology platform used in the assay (e.g. Bruker AVANCE).
controlledVocabularyValues: Indirect proportion method on LJ medium
Indirect proportion method on Middlebrook Agar 7H9
Indirect proportion method on Middlebrook Agar 7H10
Indirect proportion method on Middlebrook Agar 7H11

studyAssayOtherPlatform.name: studyAssayOtherPlatform
studyAssayOtherPlatform.title: Other Technology Platform
studyAssayOtherPlatform.description: If Other was selected in Technology Platform, list any other technology platforms that were used in this Dataset.

studyAssayCellType.name: studyAssayCellType
studyAssayCellType.title: Cell Type
studyAssayCellType.description: The name of the cell line from which the source or sample derives.

title.name: title
title.title: Title
title.description: The main title of the Dataset

subtitle.name: subtitle
subtitle.title: Subtitle
subtitle.description: A secondary title that amplifies or states certain limitations on the main title

alternativeTitle.name: alternativeTitle
alternativeTitle.title: Alternative Title
alternativeTitle.description: Either 1) a title commonly used to refer to the Dataset or 2) an abbreviation of the main title

alternativeURL.name: alternativeURL
alternativeURL.title: Alternative URL
alternativeURL.description: Another URL where one can view or access the data in the Dataset, e.g. a project or personal webpage

otherId.name: otherId
otherId.title: Other Identifier
otherId.description: Another unique identifier for the Dataset (e.g. producer's or another repository's identifier)

otherIdAgency.name: otherIdAgency
otherIdAgency.title: Agency
otherIdAgency.description: The name of the agency that generated the other identifier

otherIdValue.name: otherIdValue
otherIdValue.title: Identifier
otherIdValue.description: Another identifier uniquely identifies the Dataset

author.name: author
author.title: Author
author.description: The entity, e.g. a person or organization, that created the Dataset

authorName.name: authorName
authorName.title: Name
authorName.watermark: 1) Family Name, Given Name or 2) Organization XYZ
authorName.description: The name of the author, such as the person's name or the name of an organization

authorAffiliation.name: authorAffiliation
authorAffiliation.title: Affiliation
authorAffiliation.description: The name of the entity affiliated with the author, e.g. an organization's name

authorIdentifierScheme.name: authorIdentifierScheme
authorIdentifierScheme.title: Identifier Type
authorIdentifierScheme.description: The type of identifier that uniquely identifies the author (e.g. ORCID, ISNI)

authorIdentifier.name: authorIdentifier
authorIdentifier.title: Identifier
authorIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies the author when paired with an identifier type

datasetContact.name: datasetContact
datasetContact.title: Point of Contact
datasetContact.description: The entity, e.g. a person or organization, that users of the Dataset can contact with questions

datasetContactName.name: datasetContactName
datasetContactName.title: Name
datasetContactName.description: The name of the point of contact, e.g. the person's name or the name of an organization

datasetContactAffiliation.name: datasetContactAffiliation
datasetContactAffiliation.title: Affiliation
datasetContactAffiliation.description: The name of the entity affiliated with the point of contact, e.g. an organization's name

datasetContactEmail.name: datasetContactEmail
datasetContactEmail.title: E-mail
datasetContactEmail.description: The point of contact's email address

dsDescription.name: dsDescription
dsDescription.title: Description
dsDescription.description: A summary describing the purpose, nature, and scope of the Dataset

dsDescriptionValue.name: dsDescriptionValue
dsDescriptionValue.title: Text
dsDescriptionValue.description: A summary describing the purpose, nature, and scope of the Dataset

dsDescriptionDate.name: dsDescriptionDate
dsDescriptionDate.title: Date
dsDescriptionDate.description: The date when the description was added to the Dataset. If the Dataset contains more than one description, e.g. the data producer supplied one description and the data repository supplied another, this date is used to distinguish between the descriptions

subject.name: subject
subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The area of study relevant to the Dataset

keyword.name: keyword
keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: A key term that describes an important aspect of the Dataset and information about any controlled vocabulary used

keywordValue.name: keywordValue
keywordValue.title: Term
keywordValue.description: A key term that describes important aspects of the Dataset

keywordTermURI.name: keywordTermURI
keywordTermURI.title: Term URI
keywordTermURI.description: A URI that points to the web presence of the Keyword Term

keywordVocabulary.name: keywordVocabulary
keywordVocabulary.title: Controlled Vocabulary Name
keywordVocabulary.description: The controlled vocabulary used for the keyword term (e.g. LCSH, MeSH)

keywordVocabularyURI.name: keywordVocabularyURI
keywordVocabularyURI.title: Controlled Vocabulary URL
keywordVocabularyURI.description: The URL where one can access information about the term's controlled vocabulary

topicClassification.name: topicClassification
topicClassification.title: Topic Classification
topicClassification.description: Indicates a broad, important topic or subject that the Dataset covers and information about any controlled vocabulary used

topicClassVocab.name: topicClassVocab
topicClassVocab.title: Controlled Vocabulary Name
topicClassVocab.description: The controlled vocabulary used for the keyword term (e.g. LCSH, MeSH)

topicClassVocabURI.name: topicClassVocabURI
topicClassVocabURI.title: Controlled Vocabulary URL
topicClassVocabURI.description: The URL where one can access information about the term's controlled vocabulary

publication.name: publication
publication.title: Related Publication
publication.description: The article or report that uses the data in the Dataset. The full list of related publications will be displayed on the metadata tab

publicationRelationType.name: publicationRelationType
publicationRelationType.title: Relation Type
publicationRelationType.description: The nature of the relationship between this Dataset and the related publication

publicationCitation.name: publicationCitation
publicationCitation.title: Citation
publicationCitation.description: The full bibliographic citation for the related publication

publicationIDType.name: publicationIDType
publicationIDType.title: Identifier Type
publicationIDType.description: The type of identifier that uniquely identifies a related publication

publicationIDNumber.name: publicationIDNumber
publicationIDNumber.title: Identifier
publicationIDNumber.description: The identifier for a related publication

publicationURL.name: publicationURL
publicationURL.title: URL
publicationURL.description: The URL form of the identifier entered in the Identifier field, e.g. the DOI URL if a DOI was entered in the Identifier field. Used to display what was entered in the ID Type and ID Number fields as a link. If what was entered in the Identifier field has no URL form, the URL of the publication webpage is used, e.g. a journal article webpage

language.name: language
language.title: Language
language.description: A language that the Dataset's files is written in

producer.title: Producer

producerName.description: The name of the entity, e.g. the person's name or the name of an organization

producerAffiliation.title: Affiliation
producerAffiliation.description: The name of the entity affiliated with the producer, e.g. an organization's name

producerAbbreviation.title: Abbreviated Name
producerAbbreviation.description: The producer's abbreviated name (e.g. IQSS, ICPSR)

producerLogoURL.description: The URL of the producer's logo

productionDate.title: Production Date
productionDate.description: The date when the data were produced (not distributed, published, or archived)

productionPlace.name: productionPlace
productionPlace.title: Production Location
productionPlace.description: The location where the data and any related materials were produced or collected

contributor.name: contributor
contributor.title: Contributor
contributor.description: The entity, such as a person or organization, responsible for collecting, managing, or otherwise contributing to the development of the Dataset

contributorType.name: contributorType
contributorType.title: Type
contributorType.description: Indicates the type of contribution made to the dataset

contributorName.name: contributorName
contributorName.title: Name
contributorName.description: The name of the contributor, e.g. the person's name or the name of an organization

grantNumber.name: grantNumber
grantNumber.title: Funding Information
grantNumber.description: Information about the Dataset's financial support

grantNumberAgency.name: grantNumberAgency
grantNumberAgency.title: Agency
grantNumberAgency.description: The agency that provided financial support for the Dataset

grantNumberValue.name: grantNumberValue
grantNumberValue.title: Identifier
grantNumberValue.description: The grant identifier or contract identifier of the agency that provided financial support for the Dataset

distributor.name: distributor
distributor.title: Distributor
distributor.description: The entity, such as a person or organization, designated to generate copies of the Dataset, including any editions or revisions

distributorName.name: distributorName
distributorName.title: Name
distributorName.description: The name of the entity, e.g. the person's name or the name of an organization

distributorAffiliation.name: distributorAffiliation
distributorAffiliation.title: Affiliation
distributorAffiliation.description: The name of the entity affiliated with the distributor, e.g. an organization's name

distributorAbbreviation.name: distributorAbbreviation
distributorAbbreviation.title: Abbreviated Name
distributorAbbreviation.description: The distributor's abbreviated name (e.g. IQSS, ICPSR)

distributorURL.name: distributorURL
distributorURL.title: URL

distributorLogoURL.name: distributorLogoURL
distributorLogoURL.title: Logo URL
distributorLogoURL.description: The URL of the distributor's logo image, used to show the image on the Dataset's page

distributionDate.name: distributionDate
distributionDate.title: Distribution Date
distributionDate.description: The date when the Dataset was made available for distribution/presentation

depositor.name: depositor
depositor.title: Depositor
depositor.description: The entity, such as a person or organization, that deposited the Dataset in the repository

dateOfDeposit.name: dateOfDeposit
dateOfDeposit.title: Deposit Date
dateOfDeposit.description: The date when the Dataset was deposited into the repository

timePeriodCovered.name: timePeriodCovered
timePeriodCovered.title: Time Period
timePeriodCovered.description: The time period that the data refer to. Also known as span. This is the time period covered by the data, not the dates of coding, collecting data, or making documents machine-readable

timePeriodCoveredStart.name: timePeriodCoveredStart
timePeriodCoveredStart.title: Start Date
timePeriodCoveredStart.description: The start date of the time period that the data refer to

timePeriodCoveredEnd.name: timePeriodCoveredEnd
timePeriodCoveredEnd.title: End Date
timePeriodCoveredEnd.description: The end date of the time period that the data refer to

dateOfCollection.name: dateOfCollection
dateOfCollection.title: Date of Collection
dateOfCollection.description: The dates when the data were collected or generated

dateOfCollectionStart.name: dateOfCollectionStart
dateOfCollectionStart.title: Start Date
dateOfCollectionStart.description: The date when the data collection started

dateOfCollectionEnd.name: dateOfCollectionEnd
dateOfCollectionEnd.title: End Date
dateOfCollectionEnd.description: The date when the data collection ended

kindOfData.name: kindOfData
kindOfData.title: Data Type
kindOfData.description: The type of data included in the files (e.g. survey data, clinical data, or machine-readable text)

series.name: series
series.title: Series
series.description: Information about the dataset series to which the Dataset belong

seriesName.name: seriesName
seriesName.title: Name
seriesName.description: The name of the dataset series

seriesInformation.name: seriesInformation
seriesInformation.title: Information
seriesInformation.description: Can include 1) a history of the series and 2) a summary of features that apply to the series

software.name: software
software.title: Software
software.description: Information about the software used to generate the Dataset

softwareName.name: softwareName
softwareName.title: Name
softwareName.description: The name of software used to generate the Dataset

softwareVersion.name: softwareVersion
softwareVersion.title: Version
softwareVersion.description: The version of the software used to generate the Dataset, e.g. 4.11

relatedMaterial.name: relatedMaterial
relatedMaterial.title: Related Material
relatedMaterial.description: Information, such as a persistent ID or citation, about the material related to the Dataset, such as appendices or sampling information available outside of the Dataset

relatedDatasets.name: relatedDatasets
relatedDatasets.title: Related Dataset
relatedDatasets.description: Information, such as a persistent ID or citation, about a related dataset, such as previous research on the Dataset's subject

otherReferences.name: otherReferences
otherReferences.title: Other Reference
otherReferences.description: Information, such as a persistent ID or citation, about another type of resource that provides background or supporting material to the Dataset

dataSources.name: dataSources
dataSources.title: Data Source
dataSources.description: Information, such as a persistent ID or citation, about sources of the Dataset (e.g. a book, article, serial, or machine-readable data file)

originOfSources.name: originOfSources
originOfSources.title: Origin of Historical Sources
originOfSources.description: For historical sources, the origin and any rules followed in establishing them as sources

accessToSources.name: accessToSources
accessToSources.title: Documentation and Access to Sources
accessToSources.description: 1) Methods or procedures for accessing data sources and 2) any special permissions needed for access

workflowType.name: workflowType
workflowType.title: Computational Workflow Type
